title: Add ICP to your account
qrCodeLabel: QR code of your account id
warning: Only send ICP tokens to this address. Other tokens will be lost forever.
buyIcpHint: You can also buy ICP with a credit card via a third-party provider.

buyIcp.title: Buy ICP
buyIcp.description: ICP is the native utility token of the Internet Computer Protocol. You can lock ICP into neurons to participate in the governance of the Internet Computer.
buyIcp.disclaimer: Clicking the button below will take you to a third-party website to complete your ICP transaction at your own risk.
